title: cornus capitata subsp. angustata
intro: Cornus capitata subsp. angustata, also known as the Narrow-leaved Dogwood, is a plant species belonging to the Cornus genus. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of the Narrow-leaved Dogwood include its ability to relieve fever, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be made for medicinal use.
